name: Claude 3 Opus
tagline: Top-tier model of the original Claude 3 family; most capable Claude at its launch.
metaDescription: Claude 3 Opus (Anthropic), released 2024-03-04 — part of the Claude Opus line. Top-tier model of the original Claude 3 family; most capable Claude at its launc…
overview: Claude 3 Opus is a large language model from Anthropic, part of the Claude Opus line. Released 2024-03-04. Anthropic's flagship Claude tier — most capable Opus-class model for the hardest reasoning, coding, and long-horizon agentic work.
What's notable in this version: Top-tier model of the original Claude 3 family; most capable Claude at its launch.
